name: Intuned
long_description: Intuned is a code-first browser automation platform with an AI agent that builds and maintains your automations. Developers use Intuned to deploy scrapers, RPAs, and crawlers as production-ready TypeScript or Python projects — with stealth, CAPTCHA solving, proxies, auth, and scheduling handled out of the box. The agent builds projects from a prompt, fixes failed runs, and can self-heal automations autonomously when websites change.
one_liner: Code-first scrapers and RPAs — built and maintained by AI
